text.title: ASP.NET Core Patterns Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply ASP.NET Core Patterns. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: scaffold-feature-folders
step.action: Generate Features/<Name>/ with controller, service, repository, DTOs.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: wire-di-and-pipeline
step.action: Register services with correct lifetimes; configure middleware pipeline.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: thread-cancellation-tokens
step.action: Add CancellationToken as last param on every async method; thread to EF Core calls.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: wire-automapper
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: return-problemdetails
step.action: Replace ad-hoc 500s with ProblemDetails; wire global exception handler.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
